The brand hit us with a number of official price hikes at the end of 2025, just before launching the all-new Sonos Play at $299 and the Sonos Era 100 SL speaker at $189, but we are seeing some price drops on both its portable speakers and soundbars as well as the mini wireless subwoofer for those looking to either expand an existing setup or jump in for the first time this spring.

items.title: Affordably bring home a 32-inch to 75-inch Roku smart TV with up to 25% spring savings starting from $99
items.summary:
During the remaining days of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale, you can affordably bring home a Roku smart TV with up to 25% discounts starting from $99. While things start lowest with the 720p 32-inch Select Series HD Smart TV at $99 shipped, I personally would spend the minuscule extra amount to instead go with the 32-inch Select Series 1080p Full HD Smart TV at $109.99 shipped that has fallen from $130 here, unless you’d prefer a much more advanced and larger model, like the 72-inch Plus Series 4K QLED Smart TV or any of the models in-between them. Not only is the 1080p 32-inch model starting with an already budget-friendly full price, but the $20 cut from the tag puts it back at its all-time low. Be sure to head below and browse the full lineup of deals while they last, which make excellent opportunities to upgrade your media rooms, kids’ rooms, or elsewhere in your home and beyond.

This is one of those purchases that few look forward to shelling out for, but you might as well spend less while you can. To each their own, but I prefer styles that aren’t flashy and priorize comfort. This set is comprised of 47% viscose, which helps keep you cooler than cotton. Head below to find many more options to pick from with pricing that’s up to 33% off.

items.title: No outlet, no problem – WYZE Bulb Cam can help at $40, more security gear from $30 (Up to 36% off)
items.summary:
Amazon’s Big Spring Sale is kicking right now and WYZE is offering up to 36% off it’s already-affordable home security lineup. My top pick is the standout WYZE Bulb Security Camera down at $39.98 shipped. This unit tends to sell for $50, but right now you can cash in for $10 less. Not much needs to be said here about what makes this security camera different. Instead of a wall outlet, it can derive it’s power from a light fixture. This paves the way for hassle-free installation and best of all, it still has a built-in light too. You can find a lot of other WYZE discounts down below that are priced from $30.

Fanttik’s official storefront is getting in on the Amazon Big Spring Deals action with up to 56% off its tool lineup. To my eye, one of the standouts here is the Fanttik S1 APEX Electric Screwdriver for $76.99 shipped. This unit generally sells for $110 and the price you’re looking at today marks a return to the lowest Amazon offer we’ve tracked. It hasn’t been this low since early December either. One glance probably tells you what I like here, and it’s the pivoting design. This allows it to fit all sorts of places a bulkier screwdriver cannot. Other perks include a handy carrying case, a digital display, carrying case, and USB-C charging. Head below to find a whole lot more Fanttik tools on sale from $30.

more…

One standout is the HOTO Cordless USB-C Rechargeable Hot Glue Gun down at $23.97 Prime shipped. If you don’t have Prime, check out with at least $35 in your cart to score free shipping. Over the last few months, this unit has sold for as much as $40, but more often than not it’s between $30 and $36. That said, you’re looking at up to 40% off and a price that comes within a couple of bucks of the best Amazon price we’ve tracked in over a year. This hot glue gun sidesteps the need for an outlet with a rechargeable design that tops off over USB-C. This makes it a nice replacement for standard solutions if you ask me. Head below to find a whole lot more HOTO gear that’s up to 50% off.

items.summary:
We’re right in the middle of Amazon’s Big Spring Sale and it’s time to highlight HUANUO’s lineup of desks, office chairs, monitor mounts, and more. Pricing kicks off from $24 and markdowns go as high as 54% off. I spend a lot of time at my desk, and so I’m a big fan of ergonomic chairs, which is why I’m leading with the HUANUO Ergonomic Office Chair at $95.97 shipped.
